Onchain FX ยท Live LP ยท Delta-Hedged ยท Watch

autonomous paper LP pressed forward against live Base feeds ยท EUR/USD on Base ยท inception 2026-06-17 18:25:33Z ยท last tick 2026-06-24 19:34:21Z ยท auto-refresh 120s
PAPER ONLY โ NAV is notional, no capital, no on-chain actions. Engine reused unchanged (book.py / sim.py, adversarially reviewed); live layer = feed + state + scanner + breaker.

on $10,000 ยท 172 ticks

Delta-hedge overlay โ paper short-EUR (a Sharpe trade, not a yield trade)

Hedged NAV
$10,351.02
vs naked $10,312.04 (+38.98) ยท directional vol 8.0% โ 7.7% ยท Sharpe 26.56 โ 30.69 ยท forward-only, single-vol
naked EUR delta
+62.2%
hedged residual
-3.4%
residual โ 0 at each sizing; the LP's gamma drifts it to ~ยฑ16% of book just before the next ยฑ1% rehedge (the disclosed, un-removed drift).
ฮณ-residual (the un-hedgeable LVR, โ1% ref move): $-8.36 โ the hedge removes DELTA, never LVR (gamma unhedgeable onchain).
short notional$6,559entry mid1.13291
hedge P&L$+42.40realized$+56.20
rehedges4perp cost$3.41
carrybooked at 0bandยฑ1% EUR move
Neutral at each sizing, drifts with gamma between rehedges โ not continuously neutral. Sized to the LP's live EUR $-delta (~49% of book), marked on the LP's own mid (single feed). Carry booked at 0; any + carry is upside. Paper only โ no venue, no funds: basis between the legs is 0 by construction (same mid), not in reality (a real Ostium short carries ~7.6bp EURC-vs-spot residual the paper model omits).

Ranks on NET (gross fee โ parametric LVR), fee_share in v3 L-units (F2). Reallocates only past the switch-cost hurdle (payback โค30d + 50bp hysteresis). Mostly declines at $10k โ the edge is structural. โ screened pools (TVL < $300k) are watched but not allocated โ their volume/TVL implies a wash-inflated APR a $10k LP can't actually earn.

live_render.py ยท EUR/USD on Base ยท band ยฑ3% ยท ฯ blended (2y prior shrinking toward run-realized TWAP vol, F3) ยท fee_share in v3 L-units (F2) ยท LVR parametric @ ฯ (diagnostic, not subtracted from NAV) ยท basis a discrete realloc cost (F4) ยท TWAP mark via observe() (F1) ยท self-healing block cursor (F5) ยท two baselines (F8).
Reuses book.py (LP primitives) ยท sim.py (Elsts geometry, Ledger) ยท pyth.py (FV) ยท live_mid.py (Base RPC). Paper only.
